_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Ko te hoa, ka uru.
speakFriend.description: I hangaia a Liana Banyan kia tuwhera ki ia reo katoa. He moni whakamahana kotahi mo ia reo tuwhera.
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Ko te rarangi reo me nga reiti Marks he whai waa. Ko Marks he tohu urunga, ehara i te hea.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Whakamāori a Liana Banyan ki te {{language}}. Whiwhi {{marks}} Marks.
speakFriend.scopeWelcome: Ngā mata Nau Mai / Te Ao Wairua
speakFriend.scopeNavigation: Tohu arataki me nga korero hapa
speakFriend.baseLanguage: Reo putake -- kaore he moni e hiahiatia ana.
speakFriend.claimedBy: @{{handle}} i kiia -- kei te haere tonu.
speakFriend.speakFounderTitle: Te Reo o te Kaiwhakaaro: He aha enei kupu
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Ko ia kupu i tenei papanga he take ma tona ingoa. Ko te putake o nga ingoa 26 tino nui.
speakFriend.howBountiesWork: Me pehea te mahi a nga Moni Whakamāori
speakFriend.step1Body: Huakina he Moni Whakamāori mai i te papa Help Wanted.
speakFriend.step2Body: Whakamāori i ngā raina katoa e hiahiatia ana. Tukua ma te ara Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: I muri i te whakaaetanga, ka whiwhi koe i Marks ka tohua ki te IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Ko hoa, tomokia."

languageSwitcher.tip: Whakamahia nga kupu huna reo rereke i te Kuaha o Durin hei whakatuwhera wheako ahurei!
